markets.rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' Ripple-Dollar Real Time Index (XRPUSD_RTI) before 8 PM EST is between 0.68000-0.6999 at 8 PM EST on Mar 5, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on a simple average of the CF Benchmarks index for the 60 seconds prior to the specified time. The price must meet the criterion at exactly the specified time on the target date. markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jaylen Brown records 1+ Steals in the Charlotte at Boston professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 4, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Charlotte at Boston professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 4, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's steals recorded.
markets.title: Jaylen Brown: 1+ steals

markets.rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' Ripple-Dollar Real Time Index (XRPUSD_RTI) before 12 PM EST is above 2.1399 at 12 PM EST on Mar 5, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on a simple average of the CF Benchmarks index for the 60 seconds prior to the specified time.
